name: Shenzhou IVA Suit
tagline: China's launch-entry suit, worn on every Shenzhou flight since 2003
description: Chinese launch-entry pressure suit derived from the Soviet Sokol family. Used on Shenzhou 5 in 2003 when Yang Liwei became China's first taikonaut, and on every subsequent Shenzhou mission. Back-entry seam, fixed helmet, umbilical-fed; the architectural similarity to Sokol reflects China's early space-program technology transfer from Russia.
best_known_for: Worn by every Chinese taikonaut on every Shenzhou flight since 2003
